summary: Mixed recording quality with a brief but enjoyable first set on a hot west‑coast night
review: The reviewer enjoyed stumbling onto this 1988 show despite a short first set, calling it a "good time" on a hot day. No specific comments were made about the audio fidelity, so the recording’s technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 3‑star review; reviewer liked the vibe but noted a short set and gave no details on sound, leading to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as unusually short but still enjoyable; overall atmosphere was positive despite limited length.
